reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son muy lentos para despachar combustible y cobrar. En consecuencia se forman colas larguísimas para cargar nafta a pesar de haber ido un día de semana y fuera de hora pico.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are very slow at pumping fuel and taking payments. Consequently, extremely long lines form to fill up, even on weekdays and outside of peak hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ0bXRqekdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui a tomar un café y me mataron con los precios. Como siempre el area de servicio es un robo....aprovechan que no puedes optar por otro pecio

(Translated by Google)
I went for a coffee and the prices killed me. As always, the service area is a rip-off...they take advantage of the fact that you can't get any other price.
